app.title: One Question a Day
app.tagline: One question. One day. The world answers.

history.title: My answers
history.subtitle: The questions you've answered.
history.privacyNote: Based on today's session hash — we don't store a user ID across days. Your history resets when the daily salt rotates (UTC 00:00).

about.title: One Question a Day
about.subtitle: One question. One day. The whole world answers.
about.step1Body: A single question publishes each day at midnight UTC. No feed, no doomscroll — just today's.
about.step2Body: Pick one of the options. You only get one answer per day, and your choice is anonymous.
about.step3Body: Right after you answer, the results appear on a world map — country by country.
about.privacyBody: No accounts. Only one strictly-necessary cookie. Your IP is never stored — only a hash salted with a key that rotates daily. No ads, no third-party tracking.
about.languagesBody: Available in English, Korean, Japanese and Spanish. We're adding more.

question.noQuestionToday: No question today — please check back soon.
question.translationFallback: Translation not available in your language. Showing English.
question.keyboardHint: Tip: press 1–{max} to pick an option

map.hint: Drag to pan · scroll to zoom · click a country

archive.title: Archive
archive.noItems: No questions in this view yet.

suggest.title: Suggest a question
suggest.description: Got a good question? Send it our way.
suggest.errorSpam: That doesn't look like a question we can use.

legal.cookieNoticeBody: This site uses only strictly necessary cookies to remember your daily answer. No tracking cookies.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.pageBody: We hit an unexpected error. You can retry below.
error.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
